headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -44.9)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 17% over 7 days (moderate momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 134 quotes including 101 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and dissatisfaction today.
• While still elevated, frustration scores dropped from yesterday's peak but remain well above the typical range.
• Fears plummeted from positive to strongly negative territory, while optimism stayed deeply subdued with minimal recovery.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
